message.content:
Here's a complete extraction of all visible design specs from the document:

### Colors (hex)
- primary: #FFE01B
- ink: #241C15
- background_cream: #EFEDE9
- background_white: #FFFFFF
- accent_green: #2D4F35
- accent_peach: #F4C9A4
- accent_blue: #1B3358
- accent_red: #C8442E

### Typography
- display_font: "Fraunces (light weight) – rounded, warm serif for headline"
- body_font: "Inter – plain, legible sans-serif for everything else"
- rule: "always pair one expressive serif display face with one plain sans-serif"

### Shape
- corner_radius: "8-16px on cards/buttons, soft not sharp, not full pill by default"
- background_default: "warm cream, not pure white"

### Layout
- rhythm: "alternate full-bleed section backgrounds (cream / dark / cream / dark)"
- whitespace: "generous; max body paragraph width ~635px"

### Components
- primary_button: "Peppercorn fill, cream text, 8-12px radius"
- secondary_button: "Cavendish Yellow fill, Peppercorn text – OR outline style"
- links: "text links with arrow for secondary actions, not always buttons"

### Imagery
- style: "hand-drawn, slightly imperfect illustration over stock photography"

### Motion
- style: "restrained – fade/slide-up on scroll, fast subtle hover states, no jarring transitions"

### Voice
- style: "active voice, plain verbs, sentence case, specific over clever, long-form content"

### Document Usage
- instruction: "Save this file in your project repo (e.g. /design/design-system.md)"
